query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_records, SUM(CASE WHEN totalSales != (taxExemptSales + taxableSales) AND taxableSales > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as still_broken FROM dailySales WHERE locationId IN (1, 2, 4);
